name: FIRST REPUBLIC BANK Depositary Shares each representing a 1/40th interest in a share of 4.000% Noncumulative Perpetual Series M Preferred Stock
summary: FIRST REPUBLIC BANK Depositary Shares each representing a 1/40th interest in a share of 4.000% Noncumulative Perpetual Series M Preferred Stock represents preferred stock issued by First Republic Bank. These shares provide a fixed dividend payment and have preference over common stock in the event of liquidation. Depositary receipts represent ownership in these preferred shares.
